name: Chengdu Xinzhu Road&Bridge Machinery Co.,LTD
summary: Chengdu Xinzhu Road&Bridge Machinery Co.,LTD provides system integration products and services to the public transportation and civil construction fields. The company offers rail transit systems; energy vehicles, including electric fast-charging city buses and logistics vehicles; and bridge functional components, such as bridge bearings, bridge expansion devices, pre-stressed anchors, and other products. It also provides traffic environment governance products comprising metal and non-metallic sound barriers, transparent sound insulation boards, wind barriers, light barriers, and other products; and solutions for land traffic safety operations and management of geological disasters. The company also exports its bridge functional components to Europe, Asia, Africa, and the Middle East. Chengdu Xinzhu Road&Bridge Machinery Co.,LTD was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.
